expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the holdout regression focus: “Promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature.” It further evaluates that focus under evidence constraints and explains why it cannot be demonstrated due to missing Phase 7 artifacts.

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md align the assessment to Holdout/Phase 7 promotion-finalization: execution_notes.md notes “Primary phase under test: holdout (promotion/finalization)” and reviews “Phase 7 (holdout/promotion/finalization gate)”; result.md states “Primary phase under test: Holdout” and details Phase 7 approval/promotion mechanics (archive final, promote draft to qa_plan_final.md, write finalization record, generate final plan summary).
